# timescaledb_resource

## Purpose

TimescaleDB connection resource — Postgres extension. Adds hypertable / compression / retention / continuous-aggregate helpers on top of the standard Postgres connection.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `host` | `str` | TimescaleDB / Postgres host. |
| `database` | `str` | Database name. |
| `username` | `str` | Postgres username. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `resource_key` | `str` | `"timescaledb_resource"` | Resource key. |
| `port` | `int` | `5432` | Postgres port. |
| `password` | `str` | — | Password. Set this OR password_env_var. |
| `password_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with password. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ssl` | `bool` | `false` | Use sslmode=require. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.TimescaleDBResourceComponent
attributes:
  resource_key: timescaledb_resource
  host: localhost
  port: 5432
  database: metrics
  username: postgres
  password_env_var: TIMESCALEDB_PASSWORD
```

## Validation level

**code** — see the matching `vendors/<name>.md` page for live demo status.
